description: Decomposition: one container split into two. Hungarian + multi-feature similarity picks the closer of the two (orderApi) as the rename target. The second container surfaces as `added`. Confidence on the chosen rename reflects pair similarity, not split-ambiguity — both candidates are reasonably similar so the chosen one gets HIGH-band confidence. A future enhancement could compute a margin-based ambiguity score, but PR review agents can already see that a sibling `added` shares the same dependencies and infer the split.
